case_title: RAYMOND EDWARDS VS. VANESSA GONZALES et al

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT VANESSA GONZALES WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, RAYMOND IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GONZALES, VANESSA EVANS PROPERTY MANAGMENT INC. AKA EPMI A BAYSITE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
